# INGetAvailableRestaurantReservationBookingDefaultsIntentResponseCode.success

**Case**

You successfully handled the intent.

## Declaration

```swift
case success
```

## Discussion

Use this code if your app was successful in providing a set of default values.

## Constants

- **INGetAvailableRestaurantReservationBookingDefaultsIntentResponseCode.failure**: You were unable to provide a set of default values.
- **INGetAvailableRestaurantReservationBookingDefaultsIntentResponseCode.unspecified**: You chose not to provide default values.
